notes: imageDataUri is REQUIRED (multimodal flow: the textbook photo is the primary context). Each case embeds a small synthetic textbook-page PNG (English text, rendered offline — teachers commonly photograph English-medium textbooks even when requesting Bengali/Tamil output; the 'language' field drives output language). activities[].content may contain LaTeX wrapped in $...$ — the script check must tolerate Latin math notation and digits alongside the target script. activities[].chalkboardNote and answerKey[].answer are excluded (optional / often numeric). worksheetContent is a legacy Markdown field auto-filled by the flow — do not script-check it separately. userId omitted so no Storage/Firestore persistence.
